description: User clicks on the 'St George' suggestion in the lender search field.

description: The page navigates from the lender selection to the property worth question.
page_title: How much do you think your property is worth?

description: User types '1.10' into the property worth input field using the on-screen keyboard.
page_title: How much do you think your property is worth?
frame_description: The user interacts with the numeric keyboard to enter a value.
